channel.title: Git on Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Git on Blog

item.title: Git Cheatsheet
item.description: Global Settings Related Setup: https://gist.github.com/hofmannsven/6814278 Related Pro Tips: https://ochronus.com/git-tips-from-the-trenches/ Interactive Beginners Tutorial: http://try.github.io/ Git Cheatsheet by GitHub: https://services.github.com/on-demand/downloads/github-git-cheat-sheet/ Reminder Press minus + shift + s and return to chop/fold long lines! Show folder content: ls -la Notes Do not put (external) dependencies in version control! Setup See where Git is located: which git Get the version of Git: git --version Create an alias (shortcut) for git status: git config --global alias.
